backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Parwati Dairy app, defining types and state for orders, deliveries, regular customers, daily order records, and user profiles, with CRUD operations, SMS simulation via HTTP outcalls, and role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades the actor state from OldActor (without dailyOrderRecords) to NewActor by adding an empty dailyOrderRecords map and resetting nextRecordId to 0.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering TanStack Query hooks, daily order records UI, and admin access guards.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the purpose and content of each file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Parwati Dairy React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining all application routes (home, products, order, contact, order history, delivery schedule, regular customers) under a shared Layout root.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Reusable React component that gates content behind admin authentication, showing a login prompt, unauthorized message, or loading spinner based on Internet Identity and admin status checks.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with a sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation bar linking to all major pages, and an Outlet for rendering child routes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including orders, deliveries, regular customers, and daily delivery records via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a warm dairy-themed color palette with CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes, plus a utility class for Hindi/Devanagari text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying Parwati Dairy's address, phone numbers, and branding in a card-based layout with clickable phone links.
frontend/src/pages/DeliverySchedule.tsx: Displays a delivery schedule page showing pending ('placed') orders for a hardcoded customer (ID=1), with loading skeletons and error states, fetched via useOrderHistory hook.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page for Parwati Dairy featuring a hero section with logo, navigation buttons for Milk/Paneer/Ghee orders and Contact, and a 'Why Choose Us' features section.
frontend/src/pages/OrderForm.tsx: Order form page allowing users to select a product, enter contact/address details, pick a delivery date, and submit via WhatsApp, with real-time total calculation and validation.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistory.tsx: Shows order history for a customer (or all orders for admins), with status icons/badges, loading skeletons, and error handling, using useOrderHistory and useAllOrders hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Products listing page displaying Milk, Paneer, and Ghee with prices, descriptions, and 'Order Now' buttons that navigate to the order form with the selected product pre-filled.
frontend/src/pages/RegularCustomers.tsx: React page for managing regular milk delivery customers, supporting add/edit/delete customers, recording daily deliveries and payments, and viewing daily order records with admin-only access control.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts: Utility that constructs a pre-filled WhatsApp message for dairy product orders and opens it in a new tab targeting the Parwati Dairy business number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, Inter/Devanagari font families, border radius variables, and accordion keyframe animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 33) tracking the Parwati Dairy app's architectural notes, known issues, and the full list of implemented features for build planning and continuity.
